name: Consumer Credit Counseling Services
description_short: Bartlett, TN's Consumer Credit Counseling Services at 2855 Stage Village Cove offers free debt management and credit counseling.
description_long:
Located at 2855 Stage Village Cove in Bartlett, TN, this Consumer Credit Counseling Services location is a standalone facility dedicated to helping residents with credit and debt issues. The office serves the Bartlett community without being part of a larger retail environment, allowing for focused, confidential counseling sessions. While specific hours aren't listed online, you can contact the location directly to schedule an appointment.

At this Bartlett location, trained counselors provide free credit counseling, debt management plans, and financial education tailored to your specific situation. Services include reviewing your credit report, developing a budget, and creating a personalized debt repayment strategy. Whether you're dealing with overwhelming credit card debt or need guidance on rebuilding your credit, the team at this Bartlett office is equipped to help residents navigate their financial challenges.

Visiting this Consumer Credit Counseling Services office in Bartlett is ideal if you're struggling with debt, facing foreclosure, or want to improve your financial literacy. Bring identification and recent financial statements (bank statements, credit card statements, bills) so counselors can give you the most accurate advice. This is a free, confidential service designed specifically for people in the Bartlett area seeking honest financial guidance and practical debt solutions.
pros: Initial credit counseling session is completely free with no obligation
Certified counselors create personalized debt management plans tailored to each consumer's budget
May negotiate lower interest rates on credit card debt through a DMP
Consolidates multiple credit card payments into one monthly payment
Available in English and Spanish — bilingual counseling offered
Includes access to budgeting tools, debt tracking resources, and educational content
Can help reduce collection calls and creditor contact, though not guaranteed
cons: Ongoing debt management plan fees are not clearly disclosed on the website — a 'Service Fee' link is present but provides no detail
Cannot provide legal advice; consumers facing creditor lawsuits must hire an attorney separately
Cannot guarantee stopping legal action or eliminating collection calls
Multiple service subpages return 404 errors, indicating an incomplete or unmaintained web presence
No published fee schedule, accreditation details (e.g., NFCC membership), or state licensing information visible on the site
best_for: Consumers with unmanageable credit card debt who want a structured repayment plan at no upfront cost
People who want free professional guidance before committing to a paid debt relief program
Spanish-speaking consumers needing bilingual financial counseling
Individuals focused on simultaneously reducing debt and improving their credit score
diagnosis: Best suited for consumers overwhelmed by credit card debt who need structured, certified counseling at no upfront cost and are open to a multi-month debt management plan. The main caveat is that ongoing DMP fees are not transparently disclosed on the website, and consumers facing active legal action from creditors will need separate legal counsel.
services: Credit card debt review and assessment
Collection call and creditor contact intervention
Bilingual counseling in English and Spanish
meta_description: Consumer Credit Counseling Services at 2855 Stage Village Cove, Bartlett, TN. Free credit counseling and debt management help for TN residents.
